title: Breitmann in Belgium - Spa
content:
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Vhen sommer drees shake fort deir leafs,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Ash maids shake out deir locks,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Und singen mit de rifulets,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Vitch ripplen round de rocks,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Und beople swarm land-outwards,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Und cities weary men,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Hans Breitmann rode de Belgier mark
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ For Spa in Les Ardennes.

ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Und vhen he came to Spadenland,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ He found it fein und fair,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ For dey pour him out de pן¿½kן¿½ schnapps,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Dazu elixer rare;
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Und mit a soldierן¿½s inshdink
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ To find a shanse to shoot,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Mitout delay he fire afay
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Right in de Grande Redoute.

ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ De virst shot dat der Breitmann fired
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ He pring de peaches down,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ For he hit de double zן¿½ro mit
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ A gold Napoleon.
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Und ash he raked de shiners in,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ He hummed a liddle doon:
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ ן¿½I kess I tont try dat again,ן¿½
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Said he, dis afdernoon.

ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Boot vhen he coom to rouge et noir,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ A tear fell tripplin denn,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Id look so moosh like goot old dimes,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ To come dose games again.
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Yet vhen he lossed a hundred francs,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ He sadly toorned afay,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ ן¿½Iן¿½d rader keep de tiger here,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Dan vight him, any day.ן¿½

ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Und shtanding py de daple,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ He saw a French lorette
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Vat porrowed shpecie all around,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Und lossed at efery bet.
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ ן¿½Idן¿½s all de same mit dis or dat,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Or any kind of sin,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ De lorette or de rolette botן¿½
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Will make de money shpin.ן¿½

ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ He trinket of Le Pouhon well,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Und from La Sauveniן¿½re;
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ He tried it ad de Barisart,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Und auch de Gן¿½ronstן¿½re.
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ ן¿½Dey say dat Trootן¿½ lie in a well,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ So trink from all we can,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Und here weן¿½ll prove dat Troot is Health,ן¿½
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Datן¿½s so, sayd Breitemann.

ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ So long in ruined Franchimont
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ He sat on hollowed ground,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Und dinked of Wilhelm de la Marck,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Whoן¿½d raked dat coontry round.
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ ן¿½Mein Gott! how id vas mofe mine heart
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ To read in hishdory,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Und find de scattered shinin lights
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Of vellers shoost like me!

ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ ן¿½Dis nople boar-pig of Ardennes,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Dis shtately Wallowin lord,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Vas make him vamous py de pen,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Und glorious py de swordt.
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Und showed his hero-scholarship,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Vhen he wrote to de pishop, ן¿½Satis,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Brulabo monasterium
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Vestrum, si non payatis.ן¿½

ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ ן¿½Dey say dat in de keller here
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Dere lifes a coblin briest,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Dereto a teufelsjן¿½gersmann
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Vot guard a specie chest.
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ O if I vonce could find de vay,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Und spot dat box of checks,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ I voonder shoost how long ן¿½twould pe
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Pefore Iן¿½d twis deir necks.ן¿½

ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Und in de Walk of Meyerbeer,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Vhere plashin brooklets ring,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ He see vhere in de water wild
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ De wood-birds flip deir wing.
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ ן¿½Ash de prookletן¿½s lost in de rifer,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Und de riferן¿½s lost in de sea,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Mine soul kits lost on water ן¿½plain,ן¿½ן¿½
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Says Breitemann, says he.

ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Und ash he walked de Meyerbeer
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ He marcked, peside de way,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ A rock shoost like a wild boarן¿½s head,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Vraie t?te du sanglier.
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Der Breitmann heafe a shiant sigh,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Und say mit ן¿½motion grand:
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Von crate idן¿½e ish ן¿½ber all
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ In dis der Schweinpigן¿½s land.

ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ He drafel troo de Val dן¿½Amblן¿½ve,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ He lounge de schweet Sept Heures,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ He shdare indo de window-shops,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Und see de painted ware.
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ He looket at de fans und dings,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Denn said, ן¿½To tell de trutן¿½,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Dereן¿½s painted vares more dear ash dis
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Oop shdairs in La Redoute.ן¿½

ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Und sittin in de Champignon,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Vitch rose ן¿½neat Lofeן¿½s schweet hand,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ He read in books of Marmontel,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Of Jeannette et Lubin.
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Idן¿½s nice to see Simplicitas
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Rococoed oop mit vlowers,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Und dink soosh virtue shdill may life
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ In dis base vorldt of ours.

ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ ן¿½Tvas here, oopon de Spadoumont
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Deir gottashe used to set;
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ ן¿½Tvas here they keeped von simple cow
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Likevise an lettuce-bett.
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Berhaps I hafe crown vorldly since,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Yet shdill may druly say,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Dat in mine poyhoodן¿½s tays I vas
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Apout so good ash dey.

ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ But he vot vant to see dis land,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Und has nod time for all:
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Eash woodland nook und shady brook;
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ On Herr Marcette shouldt call.
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ For he has baintet all to live
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Vhen de drees demselfs are gone;
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Und shoost so goot as artist, auch,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Ish he bon compagnon.

ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Farevell, schveet Spa dou home of vlowers,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Of ruin and of rock,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Vhere vild pirds sing und de band ish blay
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Eash day at sefen oן¿½clock.
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ If all de shbrees dat Spa has seen
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Vere melted into von,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ De soul vouldt reach Nirwana lost
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ In transcendental fun.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Charles G. Leland, titled "Breitmann in Belgium - Spa", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
